quicksight.analysis.customfilterlistconf: A list of custom filter values.

quicksight.analysis.customfilterlistconf.Description: The list of category values for the filter.
The match operator that is used to determine if a filter should be applied.
quicksight.analysis.customfilterlistconf.Allowed values: CONTAINS | DOES_NOT_CONTAIN | DOES_NOT_EQUAL | ENDS_WITH | EQUALS | STARTS_WITH

quicksight.analysis.customfilterlistconf.Description: This option determines how null values should be treated when filtering data.  +  `ALL_VALUES`: Include null values in filtered results.+  `NULLS_ONLY`: Only include null values in filtered results.+  `NON_NULLS_ONLY`: Exclude null values from filtered results.
Select all of the values. Null is not the assigned value of select all.  +  `FILTER_ALL_VALUES`
